who: HR managers in small marketing agencies using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee time entries/week
offer: For HR managers in small marketing agencies using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee time entries/week, inaccurate time tracking causes payroll errors. We provide alerts instead of manual time tracking reviews.
problem: Inaccurate employee time tracking leading to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums for HR tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try real-time alerts and review interface on 1-3 entries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
